_meta.description: Third-party-grounded benchmark pack harvested from the Google Fact Check Tools API (ClaimReview markup from AP/Reuters/Snopes/PolitiFact/AFP/BBC/...). The repo's FIRST non-self-authored pack. Domain: contemporary claims (vaccines/climate/politics/science+history misconceptions) — NOT historical authorship, so this is a NEW capability axis, not validation of the dolphin provenance delta. Labels normalized from free-form textualRating; only 'false'/'true' feed eval scoring (clean ground truth); 'mixed'/'other' retained for audit, excluded from scoring.

claims.claim: “We can send BILLIONS to Ukraine but Americans who have lost everything only get $750 dollars?!”
“Trump’s Project 2025 will end” the Federal Emergency Management Agency.
"$200 billion more to Ukraine. $2,500 per month to illegal aliens. $750 to Americans who lost everything in Hurricane Helene."
"Republicans voted against FEMA aid just a few days before Hurricane Helene hit their states."
FEMA is running out of money because it spent it all on helping "illegal aliens" instead

In the response to Hurricane Helene, "while families desperately tried to escape the rising floodwaters and they climbed onto roofs, they did anything they can to live, but Kamala [Harris] didn't send any helicopters to rescue them."
“So (Los Angeles), Hollywood, and California (get) 100% aid for the next 180 days while Western North Carolina got $750.”
The Federal Emergency Management Agency “is confiscating supplies and donations!”
“The Mayor of Springfield, OH has made multiple trips to Haiti. He, and the entire City Council, received financial kick-backs for importing $20,000+ illegal aliens."
“Thanks to her [Vice President Kamala Harris'] open border, murders are up 81% in Springfield, Ohio."
Haitians are responsible for the disappearance of 16 cats in Bangor, Maine.
When Haitians go to school in Springfield, Ohio, they “take the place of our children in school” and “each one will have a private interpreter."
Video footage and news headlines authentically document an incident in which a Haitian immigrant in Springfield, Ohio, ate a cat.
In August 2024, Haitian immigrants were killing and eating pet cats and park ducks in Springfield, Ohio.
"In Springfield (Ohio), they're eating the dogs, the people that came in, they're eating the cats. They're eating, they're eating the pets of the people that live there.”
Photo shows premature babies in Gaza in 2024; newborns there are at risk
UNRWA added a black mourning stripe to its logo in response to Yahya Sinwar’s death.
claims.rating_raw: False. The black band was added in 2023 to mourn the UN agency’s dead colleagues, long before the Hamas leader was killed.

claims.claim: “Taylor Swift Forced to Cancel Eras Tour Dates Following Endorsement Backlash."
Taylor Swift brandished a flag that said: "TRUMP WON. DEMOCRATS CHEATED!"

An online graphic authentically shows Taylor Swift endorsing Joe Biden for the 2024 presidential election, saying: “Under their leadership, I believe America has a chance to start the healing process it so desperately needs.”
Singer Taylor Swift endorses Republican nominee Donald Trump for the 2024 US presidential elections.
"Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce say they will leave the United States if Donald Trump becomes President in 2024."

Former U.S. President Donald Trump said during a Sept. 11, 2024, phone interview with "Fox & Friends" that Taylor Swift would "probably pay a price" for endorsing Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 presidential election.
Taylor Swift was banned from participating in country music after endorsing Kamala Harris for president.
A photo posted to Taylor Swift's Instagram revealed the singer's endorsement of Kamala Harris in the 2024 presidential election.
Taylor Swift endorsed Donald Trump for president
Says Taylor Swift “announced a fund raising concert with Beyoncé in support of Harris” on July 23.
“Taylor Swift blames Instagram for losing millions of followers after Harris endorsement: ‘It must be a glitch!”
Coca-Cola ended its partnership with pop star Taylor Swift because she said that she would vote for U.S. Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 presidential election.
Taylor Swift “lost 17 million followers by endorsing Kamala.”
Taylor Swift cancels shows in red states
Beyoncé and Taylor Swift announced a “big endorsement concert” and said, “No more silence, before it’s too late, our voice must be heard now!”
Taylor Swift loses Coca-Cola deal after endorsing Kamala Harris
Taylor Swift lost 30 million social media followers after endorsing Democratic Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 presidential election.
Images authentically show singer Taylor Swift endorsing former U.S. President Donald Trump in the 2024 presidential election.
Taylor Swift Loses Brand Deals Worth $125 Million After The Big Endorsement
Pop star Taylor Swift canceled multiple Eras Tour shows due to poor ticket sales following her endorsement of Kamala Harris in the 2024 US presidential election.
In May 2025, U.S. President Donald Trump posted an artificial intelligence-generated image of himself as pope on Truth Social.
Trump posted an AI generated picture of himself dressed as Pope
Melania Trump uses a body double.
Melania Trump’s body double appeared alongside 2024 Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump after they cast their votes in Palm Beach, Florida, in the U.S. general election on Nov. 5.
A photograph shows U.S. President Donald Trump entering Marine Force One with an individual standing in for first lady Melania Trump.
A video shows a "fake" Melania Trump standing next to the president.
A TikTok video shows a clip of a Joe Biden body "double" carrying his own handbags to a car.
Video of a flash of light and an explosion along a busy roadway proves a laser beam shot down from the sky sparked the wildfires in Hawaii.
A video of an explosion near a gas station at night shows a “directed energy weapon” being used to start the wildfires in Maui.
A video of a laser beam starting an explosion at a gas station in Russia is an example of a directed-energy weapon in action.
Directed energy weapons caused fires in Paradise, California, and Lahaina, Hawaii.
claims.rating_raw: There is no evidence to support this. The 2018 fire in California started as a result of a fallen power line. While no cause has yet been determined for the fire in Hawaii, some experts have suggested it may have started in a similar way, with dry conditions and high winds causing the fire to spread very rapidly.

claims.claim: "Hawaii is being attacked by direct energy weapons."
New footage shows what appears to be a beam of light hitting a building and causing an explosion on Maui, Hawaii, ahead of the fires.
claims.rating_raw: This video was actually taken in a suburb of Santiago, Chile, in May, and shows an exploding transformer.

claims.claim: Maui wildfires were caused by directed energy weapon
Images of blue things that weren’t burned in Hawaii are evidence directed energy weapons started the wildfires there.
The August 2023 wildfires that devastated parts of the Hawaiian island of Maui were caused by a "direct energy weapon."
The August 2023 wildfires in Hawaii were caused by directed energy weapons
Footage shows directed energy weapons which were used to start fires in Maui.
claims.rating_raw: The footage actually shows an explosion along a power line in Louisiana, US, in 2018. There’s no evidence that directed energy weapons started fires in Maui.

claims.claim: An image shows a directed energy weapon beam that caused the Maui fires
Several photos show evidence for claims a powerful government direct energy laser weapon was the cause of several wildfires.
claims.rating_raw: There’s no evidence a government weapon or ‘direct energy laser’ caused any of the recent wildfires. The pictures used as evidence do not show evidence of this.

claims.claim: Green lights in sky show Maui fires were caused by a directed energy weapon
The ‘Maui Burst’ flavour of fizzy drink Mountain Dew shows a connection between recent wildfires on the island and directed energy weapons (DEW). It suggests the fires were somehow ‘planned’.
claims.rating_raw: There’s no evidence the fires were started using directed energy weapons, or that Mountain Dew is connected to either the fires or weapons.

claims.claim: The $750 FEMA assistance to US hurricane victims is a loan
“The $750 from FEMA that Kamala Harris is offering them is actually a loan, not real relief. And that if they don’t pay it back the feds can seize their property.”
The UK economy is growing faster than almost any other major country, including the United States.
claims.rating_raw: This is true when looking at the latest quarterly GDP growth for G7 countries. But the UK’s annual growth last year was among the worst in the G7, and the UK has seen comparatively slower growth since the pandemic than most other G7 countries, including the US.

claims.claim: President Joe Biden has "allowed an invasion to occur at our border, almost 10 million migrants have crossed into our country."
"It’s 300[,000], 350,000 people died last year from drugs."
In President Donald Trump's first 100 days, "DOJ agencies have seized more than 22 million fentanyl pills, 3,400 kilos of fentanyl … which saved ... 258 million lives."
Gates Foundation funds efforts to spread bird flu to humans
Bird flu in the U.S. is a "scamdemic" timed to coincide with the 2024 presidential elections “by design.”
“THE ASTRA ZENECA COVID JAB CONTAINED MPOX."
The World Health Organization's international public health emergency for mpox is a “planned strategy to unify everything under one centralized global gov.”
Five percent of Papua New Guinea infected with mpox in August 2024.
Video shows WHO lifting mpox emergency status in 2024
Photos of the patient in Thailand infected with new mpox strain
WHO orders governments to prepare for mpox lockdowns
Seed oils in infant formula harm the health of infants.
OPERATION SKYWATCH IGNITED: Trump & Rfk Jr Launch Global Crackdown On Chemtrails
Chemicals being sprayed in Florida skies
Chemtrails should be more visible when it’s cold, yet they are seen more commonly during the summer.
claims.rating_raw: Contrails may be less visible in winter as the weather is less humid.

claims.claim: A photo shows chemtrails in the sky from planes.
claims.rating_raw: The post appears to show contrails, formed when water vapour from aircraft engines freezes at high altitudes. Depending on humidity, these can last for many hours and eventually mix with cirrus clouds.

claims.claim: An image shows two different trails left by planes. The short one is a contrail, while the longer one, where the “trail extends for miles” and “lasts for ‘hours”, is a ‘chemtrail’.
claims.rating_raw: This isn’t the case. Both images show contrails—water vapour left behind planes. Both their size and the amount of time they remain visible differs depending on atmospheric factors, such as humidity.

claims.claim: Post implies UN creates climate change using geoengineering and chemtrails
Mexico is banning solar geoengineering, chemtrails
Climate change is ‘actually geoengineering’; weather modified by chemtrails
Media admits governments are using geoengineering to manipulate weather

U.S. Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene posted on X about prohibiting “weather modification and geoengineering” by “introducing a bill that prohibits the injection, release, or dispersion of chemicals or substances into the atmosphere for the express purpose of altering weather, temperature, climate, or sunlight intensity. It will be a felony offense."
Former CIA director admits plan for geoengineering and 'chemtrails'
The High-frequency Active Auroral Research Program (HAARP) of the University of Alaska Fairbanks is behind the recent earthquake in Myanmar.
claims.rating_raw: There is absolutely no evidence to support this claim and experts say the earthquake was a natural disaster. There’s no evidence HAARP is able to affect the weather or cause earthquakes.

claims.claim: The High-frequency Active Auroral Research Program (HAARP) is responsible for the seismic activity in Santorini.
The HAARP ionospheric research facility is linked to the earthquake in Vanuatu.
claims.rating_raw: False. The radio waves emitted by HAARP can't cause earthquakes or natural disasters.

claims.claim: The earthquake in Myanmar was not natural and was caused by HAARP
Fiery cloud over Turkey caused by HAARP
HAARP research program induced Turkey earthquakes
Video shows proof Turkey-Syria quake in February 2023 was caused by HAARP
Unique cloud in Turkey is connected to HAARP and earthquakes
Turkey's 7.8 magnitude earthquake was not a revenge attack by HAARP over NATO expansion
Videos are circulating claiming to show blue light in the sky as proof of the Blue Beam project in Morocco causing the earthquake. Other posts claim it's a confirmation that HAARP caused the quake.
Post claims to show Antarctica's "Ice Wall"
Antarctica is an ice wall that surrounds the flat Earth
A video shows Antarctica is an 'ice wall' surrounding a flat Earth.
'Man' can't advance more than 500 kilometers past Antarctic 'ice wall'
Antarctica is a wall hiding 20 more continents
Operation Highjump was to see what was beyond the 'ice wall' of Antarctica
an image authentically shows a city on the other side of the ice at Antarctica
Earth's oceans have no 'elevation features' and are in a 'container'
Artemis crew interview glitch shows it was staged
In late 2025, NASA admitted that it "didn't go to the moon."
Photo proves US Moon landing is staged
A photograph showing a group of astronauts without their helmets on indicates that the moon landings were staged.
Photo proves US Moon landing was faked.
Eight newspaper front pages carried high quality images taken by astronauts on the day of the 1969 moon landing, the day after it occurred and before Apollo 11 returned to Earth.
claims.rating_raw: This isn’t the case. None of the newspapers (aside from a satirical front page produced much later by The Onion) printed these photos until after the astronauts returned to Earth. Most of the newspapers published stills from the live broadcast, and some also used training images taken prior to it.

claims.claim: Post implies moon landings faked because lunar rover didn't fit in capsule
WikiLeaks released the footage of moon landing scenes filmed in the Nevada DesertF
"Google proves that no one ever went to the moon.”
Newspaper photos of the moon landing published on the same day could not have been transported and developed so quickly - proving the 1969 mission was faked.
claims.rating_raw: False. The initial images used by newspapers were taken from the live footage beamed around the world during the landing.

claims.claim: The moon landing was staged because it is too bright to land there
Animation of India's lunar rocket proves its Moon landing was faked.
A photograph of astronauts Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin proves the 1969 moon landing was faked because a ceiling is visible in the background.
Buzz Aldrin’s comments during an interview with Conan O’Brien prove the moon landing was fake.
Video shows Buzz Aldrin admitting the moon landing didn’t happen
Buzz Aldrin admitted that the moon landing “didn’t happen.”
NASA's new test flight to moon proves 1969 moon landing is a hoax
The phone President Richard Nixon used to talk to the first astronauts on the moon is evidence the 1969 moon landing was faked.
Wikileaks released footage showing that the moon landing was faked.
Image shows mismatch between Neil Armstrong’s spacesuit and boot print left on the Moon, therefore Moon landing was a hoax
